queries.description: Return a focused semantic context slice for one selected surface.
queries.name: slice
queries.purpose: Give an agent the smallest graph slice needed to reason about one selected semantic surface.

queries.description: Return the smallest verification target set for a mode, selector, or diff.
queries.name: verification-targets
queries.purpose: Map a selected change or mode to the smallest verification set worth running.

queries.description: Return widget behavior realization data grouped by widget, screen, capability, and effect.
queries.name: widget-behavior
queries.purpose: Show how reusable widget behavior is realized by projection usage.

queries.description: Return the semantic change plan, generator targets, risk, and alignment recommendations.
queries.name: change-plan
queries.purpose: Summarize what a selected change affects before code or Topogram edits start.

queries.description: Return the review packet for a selected change or diff.
queries.name: review-packet
queries.purpose: Bundle the context a human or agent needs to review a selected semantic change.

queries.description: Return resolved workflow guidance, artifact load order, preset policy, and recommended artifact queries.
queries.name: resolved-workflow-context
queries.purpose: Resolve workflow guidance and artifact load order for a selected mode or change.

queries.description: Return a single-agent operating plan for a mode and optional selector.
queries.name: single-agent-plan
queries.purpose: Give one coding agent a bounded plan, artifact set, and write guidance.

queries.description: Return the extract/adopt plan for an extracted workspace, including trusted extraction provenance and next review commands.
queries.name: extract-plan
queries.purpose: Summarize brownfield extraction candidates, package extractor context, and adoption review state.

queries.description: Return lane ownership, handoff packets, overlap rules, and package extractor context for extract/adopt mode.
queries.name: multi-agent-plan
queries.purpose: Split extract/adopt review into serialized and parallel agent lanes.

queries.description: Return a lane-scoped work packet for extract/adopt mode.
queries.name: work-packet
queries.purpose: Give one extract/adopt lane its allowed inputs, write scope, blockers, and handoff packet.

queries.description: Return artifact-derived lane status for extract/adopt mode.
queries.name: lane-status
queries.purpose: Show which extract/adopt lanes are ready, blocked, or complete.

queries.description: Return handoff readiness and blockers for extract/adopt mode.
queries.name: handoff-status
queries.purpose: Show extract/adopt handoff packet status across lanes.

queries.description: Return unclaimed active tasks, unresolved bugs, and approved requirements without active tasks.
queries.name: sdlc-available
queries.purpose: Show SDLC work that is ready to be claimed or shaped.

queries.description: Return claimed work, optionally filtered by --actor.
queries.name: sdlc-claimed
queries.purpose: Show claimed and in-progress SDLC tasks grouped by actor.

queries.description: Return blocked tasks, unmet blockers, and block/blocked_by reciprocity problems.
queries.name: sdlc-blockers
queries.purpose: Show SDLC task blockers and reciprocal block issues.

queries.description: Return missing requirement, acceptance, verification, or DoD proof for one task or all open tasks.
queries.name: sdlc-proof-gaps
queries.purpose: Show missing proof before a task can be completed.

queries.description: Return the risk summary for a selected change, mode, or diff.
queries.name: risk-summary
queries.purpose: Surface behavioral, ownership, and verification risks for a selected change.

queries.description: Return a proceed/no-go decision for the current selected work.
queries.name: proceed-decision
queries.purpose: Tell a human or agent whether enough context and proof exist to proceed.

queries.description: Return safe edit boundaries for a selected mode or semantic surface.
queries.name: write-scope
queries.purpose: Define where an agent may edit for a selected semantic surface.
